summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Elevideo SaaS app focusing on component overlapping fixes and dark mode improvements. Verified z-index fixes for Dashboard stats cards, tested improved dark mode slate/indigo color scheme, theme toggle functionality, and responsive design across all pages.
passed_tests: ✅ Stats cards z-index properly fixed (stat-card: z-index 0, card-3d: z-index 1) - no more overlapping
✅ Dark mode colors improved with slate/indigo scheme - excellent contrast and readability
✅ Light mode colors are correct and consistent across all pages
✅ Theme toggle works perfectly on Login and Register pages
✅ Dark mode class properly applied to DOM and persists across page navigation
✅ Login page renders correctly in both light and dark themes with glassmorphism effects
✅ Register page renders correctly in both themes with password strength indicators
✅ CSS animations working (floating elements, gradient animations)
✅ CSS gradients working properly (background patterns, button gradients)
✅ Form validation working on both login and register pages
✅ Password visibility toggle functionality working correctly
✅ Password strength indicators display properly in register form
✅ Protected routes correctly redirect to login when not authenticated
✅ Navigation between login/register pages works smoothly
✅ All form elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
✅ No JavaScript errors detected during testing
✅ Auth page background patterns render correctly in both themes
